product-design.title: product × design
product-design.promise: you're building something that teaches through doing — and you want it to work for real people, not just look good on paper.
product-design.quadrantStory: your curiosity landed here — where learning science meets making things. this is the space where we build tools, games, and experiences that teach through play — designed to flex around the beautiful variability of how humans actually learn.
product-design.story: we kick off with a concept sprint — exploring the problem space together, sketching multiple approaches, and converging on the strongest direction. then we prototype rapidly, building just enough to test core assumptions. playtests happen early and often, with real people in real contexts. we synthesise what we learn after each round and iterate. by the end of sprint two, you have a validated concept and a clear path forward.
product-design.crossover: great products aren't born from intuition alone — they're shaped by evidence. we weave research into every sprint, testing assumptions with users and measuring whether learning is actually happening. design and research aren't separate phases here; they're the same conversation.

outcomes.title: a working prototype in 2 sprints
outcomes.detail: not wireframes or mockups — a functional prototype you can put in front of real people and learn from immediately.

outcomes.title: playtest insights you can act on
outcomes.detail: structured playtests with your target users — capturing what delights, what confuses, and what needs to change.

outcomes.title: a spec your team can build from
outcomes.detail: a detailed handoff that lets your dev team build with confidence — including edge cases, accessibility requirements, and the flexibility real humans need.

examples.title: holistic skills framework
examples.detail: an interactive learning experience of a skills framework

examples.title: MindShift Missions
examples.detail: an inquiry-driven learning game where players navigate complex scenarios, make critical decisions, and explore how questioning transforms challenges into opportunities

people-research.title: people × research
people-research.promise: you need to understand what's really happening with your people — and you want evidence that holds up.
people-research.quadrantStory: your curiosity landed here — where rigorous measurement meets human complexity. this is the space where we figure out whether your interventions actually change how people think, feel, and act. we won't just hand you numbers — we'll help you tell the story of what's changing and why.
people-research.story: we begin by mapping your theory of change to things we can actually see and measure. then we design a lightweight evaluation approach — selecting validated instruments or creating custom measures that fit your context. we collect baseline data, observe your work in action, and gather responses. the analysis goes beyond simple comparisons to explore what's driving change, for whom, and under what conditions. you receive a findings story your stakeholders will understand.
people-research.crossover: research without design is just measurement. we bring a designer's eye to how we collect data — making surveys engaging, interviews conversational, and dashboards something people actually want to look at. the best evidence comes from people who want to participate.

outcomes.title: clarity on what's working
outcomes.detail: we identify the specific mechanisms driving change — not just whether something worked, but why and for whom.

outcomes.title: evidence your stakeholders trust
outcomes.detail: pre-post data, effect sizes, and confidence intervals — the kind of evidence that satisfies funders, boards, and sceptics.

outcomes.title: a path to scale
outcomes.detail: we don't just measure — we tell you what to amplify, what to adjust, and what to let go of as you grow.

examples.title: impact measurement dashboard
examples.detail: live dashboard tracking learning outcomes and engagement metrics

product-research.title: product × research
product-research.promise: you've built something and you need to know — does it actually work for the people it's meant to serve?
product-research.quadrantStory: your curiosity landed here — where user experience meets rigorous validation. this is the space where we help you see your product through the eyes of the people using it, especially the ones it might be quietly leaving out.
product-research.story: we start with a structured review — looking at your product through established usability and access lenses. then we sit alongside real users as they move through realistic tasks, learning what helps, what gets in the way, and what matters most to them. we capture experiences authentically — numbers and stories, notes and recordings — so what we gather is meaningful, not just measurable. the analysis identifies patterns and prioritises by impact and feasibility. you receive clear, specific recommendations with examples of what people found easy, hard, or valuable.
product-research.crossover: validation isn't the end of the story — it's the beginning of better design. our research always points toward solutions, not just problems. we work alongside your team to translate what we learn into improvements that actually ship.

outcomes.title: an access and inclusion snapshot
outcomes.detail: a clear view of who your product works well for and who it quietly leaves out — with ratings across key steps and a focused set of changes that respect your real constraints.

outcomes.title: usability issues mapped
outcomes.detail: a prioritised list of friction points, dead ends, and confusion — categorised by severity and linked to specific user sessions so you can see exactly what happened.

outcomes.title: a brief your stakeholders can use
outcomes.detail: a clear, visual summary that communicates findings to leadership — with recommended fixes and estimated impact, ready to share.

examples.title: UDL compliance audit template
examples.detail: PDF template for conducting Universal Design for Learning audits

people-design.title: people × design
people-design.promise: you want to change how people learn, connect, or grow — and you know it needs to be designed, not just delivered.
people-design.quadrantStory: your curiosity landed here — where behaviour change meets creative craft. this is the space where we build experiences that shift how people think and relate, not just what they know. we'll sit with you, listen to what you're noticing, and design something together that actually fits.
people-design.story: we start by listening — what are you noticing? what's not working? then we move into rapid co-design, sketching session flows and testing activities with you. we pilot with a real group, gather honest feedback, and refine until it feels right. when it makes sense, we'll bring the people most affected into the design process too. by the end, you have something tested in the field and ready to grow.
people-design.crossover: our design work is always informed by evidence — we build in feedback loops from day one so you're not just launching something that feels right, but something you can show works. justice and inclusion are threaded through everything: we use frameworks like universal design for learning as tools, and we don't claim expertise we don't have — we make space for it.

outcomes.title: a session kit you co-designed
outcomes.detail: we build it alongside your team — a facilitation toolkit that reflects your culture, your language, and your goals. not a template. yours.

outcomes.title: a live pilot with real feedback
outcomes.detail: we run the first session with you, capturing what lands and what doesn't in real time — so refinement starts immediately, not after a report.

outcomes.title: a handoff your team can run
outcomes.detail: a polished kit with facilitator notes, participant materials, and a train-the-trainer guide — so your team can carry it forward independently.

examples.detail: slide deck from our play-based learning webinar

examples.title: strengthening emotional intelligence
examples.detail: session deck covering emotional awareness, regulation strategies, and practical reflection prompts for teams
